title: Smoky Pepperoni Teriyaki Stir Fry
description: A savory Japanese-inspired stir fry with smoky pepperoni and a sweet teriyaki sauce.
instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the pepperoni and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the pepperoni from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the green onions and cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Return the pepperoni to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds and crispy garlic on top of the pepperoni.
Serve the pepperoni and sauce over steamed rice.
Garnish with additional green onions if desired.
